title: lasiandra laxa
intro: Lasiandra laxa, also known as the 'Yellow Waxflower', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and stomach discomfort. The health benefits of Lasiandra laxa include its potential to reduce inflammation and act as an antimicrobial agent, making it useful in treating various gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Lasiandra laxa are typically made into teas or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
